files.03_OpenFOAM_Implementation.md: Missing Learning Objectives and Key Takeaways sections. Add them. Good technical depth. The '## 3. global_strategy: Apply consistent 3W Framework across all files: add ## Learning Objectives (What will you learn?) at the beginning, and ## Key Takeaways (3-5 bullet points) before Quick Reference section. Eliminate cross-file redundancy by establishing clear separation: 00_Overview = BIG PICTURE & selection guide ONLY, 01_Fundamental_Drag_Concept = physics/math/equations, 02_Specific_Drag_Models = model comparison/selection details, 03_OpenFOAM_Implementation = code/classes/configuration only. Remove all OpenFOAM code from files 01 and 02. Remove detailed equation derivations from 00_Overview.
